_comment: GRC-parity block target manifest. Machine-readable source of truth for the status dashboard and the agent work-queue. Edit this (status, grc_block, params, notes); metrics are filled from verification reports by tools/gen_dashboard.py. Do NOT hand-edit STATUS.md. status: done | in_progress | planned | wont_map. tier: 1=feed-forward (autonomous), 2=stateful/loop, 3=new GRC block to build. Priority is tier-ascending then listed order.
_naming_principle: Names must match GNU Radio so users never guess the equivalent. (1) Each Kyttar block's GRC palette LABEL is its GNU Radio counterpart's label verbatim (e.g. 'FIR Filter'), keeping a 'Kyttar'/'kyttar_' marker ONLY where GRC namespacing requires it to coexist with stock GR. (2) 'grc_block' below names the EXACT GNU Radio factory (e.g. filter.fir_filter_fff) so the equivalence is explicit and searchable in the dashboard. A Kyttar block with no clean GNU Radio counterpart sets grc_block to '' and explains in notes.

blocks.notes: Reference example; fully documented. Single MULQ.
High-pass DC remover.

Verified vs filter.fir_filter_fff from 2 to 64 taps within the derived per-tap Q15 tolerance (op_count = taps). 1-7 taps single-cell; 8+ a chained partial-sum systolic wavefront laid out as a column-major serpentine FOLD (INV-8/9/10: I/O co-located on one edge, e.g. 40 taps -> a 2x4 block) whose output egresses the LAST cell. Substrate fixes: INV-6 (entry WITH params) and INV-11 (multi-cell egress: resolve the PortMap WITH the block's params in router AND placer, not the bare type). Multi-cell sweeps drive >2*ntaps samples + a deep-cell mutation so every cell is exercised (INV-12). KNOWN LIMIT (guarded): ~400 taps (80 cells) exceeds the 10x12 routing capacity.
Recursive: needs empirical/pole tolerance + zero-input limit-cycle test, NOT op-count floor.
Rate change: fractional/decimated alignment; compare on decimated time base.
Complex multiply; param parity = frequency in Hz, derive freq_word.
Param parity: frequency in Hz, not freq_word (worst-offender refactor).
LLR output; tolerance on soft values.
Proof-of-concept: works in the coherent BPSK RX demo but has NOT been through per-block GRC-equivalence verification. Param parity: samp_rate/sym_rate/alpha/ntaps.
Stateful gain loop; trim settling transient, behavioral metric.
Proof-of-concept: works in the coherent BPSK RX demo but NOT yet per-block verified. Carrier recovery loop. Lock-detector + tracking-error metric, not sample-by-sample. Param: add order.
Proof-of-concept: works in the coherent BPSK RX demo but NOT yet per-block verified. Timing recovery loop. Worst-offender param refactor (kp/ki -> sps/loop_bw).
Proof-of-concept: works in the coherent BPSK RX demo but NOT yet per-block verified. Decision output; BER metric, not NMSE on packed words.
Gated passthrough; state-dependent.
Bits -> constellation; deterministic, exact compare.
Deterministic given seed; exact compare, NO correlation (no meaningful peak).
NEW: complex gain. Trivial extension of GainBlock to I/Q.
NEW: single ADD with an immediate.
NEW: FM demod (atan2 of conjugate product). Common, high value.
NEW: mixer + decimating FIR fused. Workhorse channelizer block.
